verification_gate: Owner (David / Governance Board) records a bounded decision resolving RFC-Q3 with an explicit unblock condition, a deferral-or-rollback rule, and the current default preserved until unblocked.

gate_result.question: RFC-Q3
gate_result.decision: Proof URIs are content-addressed only in v0; mutable registry aliases are deferred. Every proof is referenced by its content hash (proof_sha256), never a mutable alias.
gate_result.unblock_condition: An RFC introducing an alias registry with explicit immutability/audit guarantees and owner sign-off.
gate_result.deferral_rollback_rule: Aliases are disabled; content-addressing remains the sole canonical proof reference.

proof_summary: DECIDE-003 records the owner-ratified bounded decision for RFC-Q3 (proof URI addressing model): Proof URIs are content-addressed only in v0; mutable registry aliases are deferred. Every proof is referenced by its content hash (proof_sha256), never a mutable alias. Unblock condition and deferral/rollback rule are recorded in 09_OPEN_QUESTIONS.md. The v0 default is preserved until an explicit unblock RFC with owner sign-off. No product execution performed.
